ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* File name of the video */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the video */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_resolution FOREIGN KEY ("resolution") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_files" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the video the audio belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* File name of the audio */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the audio */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the audio in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audio file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audio file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_files_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_captions" (
  "caption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caption */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the video the caption belongs to */,
  "frame_start" INTEGER /* Estimated start frame of the caption */,
  "frame_end" INTEGER /* Estimated end frame of the caption */,
  "word" TEXT /* Transcribed word */,
  "sentence_location" INTEGER /* Location of the word in the sentence */,
  "audio_frame_start" INTEGER /* Nearest start audio frame to the word */,
  "audio_frame_end" INTEGER /* Nearest end audio frame to the word */,
  "cap_time_frame_start" INTEGER /* Caption time frame start */,
  "cap_time_frame_end" INTEGER /* Caption time frame end */,
  "source_file_name" TEXT /* Source file name of the video */,
  "time_frame_string" TEXT /* Time frame string representation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the caption was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the caption was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_captions_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the language was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the language was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the resolution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resolution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resolution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video processing event */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the video being processed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the video processing (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video processing started */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video processing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_processing_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caption_languages" (
  "caption_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caption language */,
  "caption_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the caption */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the caption language was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the caption language was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caption_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caption_languages_caption_id FOREIGN KEY ("caption_id") REFERENCES video_captions ("caption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caption_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caption_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caption status */,
  "caption_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the caption */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the caption (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the caption status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the caption status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caption_status_caption_id FOREIGN KEY ("caption_id") REFERENCES video_captions ("caption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caption_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "caption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the caption being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "edit_description" TEXT /* Description of the edits made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caption_reviews_caption_id FOREIGN KEY ("caption_id") REFERENCES video_captions ("caption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caption_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the reviewer belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reviewer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reviewer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caption_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "caption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the caption */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the caption */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time for caption generation */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on the caption */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caption_statistics_caption_id FOREIGN KEY ("caption_id") REFERENCES video_captions ("caption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, editor, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "caption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the caption being feedback on */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_caption_id FOREIGN KEY ("caption_id") REFERENCES video_captions ("caption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "caption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the caption being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the caption */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the caption was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_caption_id FOREIGN KEY ("caption_id") REFERENCES video_captions ("caption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caption_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "caption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the caption */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the caption */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caption_versions_caption_id FOREIGN KEY ("caption_id") REFERENCES video_captions ("caption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_recognition_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the speech recognition model */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language the model supports */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_data" (
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "data" TEXT /* Training data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_testing_data" (
  "testing_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing data entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being tested */,
  "data" TEXT /* Testing data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the testing data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the testing data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech recognition model */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES speech_recognition_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech recognition model */,
  "caption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the caption generated using the model */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_usage_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES speech_recognition_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_usage_caption_id FOREIGN KEY ("caption_id") REFERENCES video_captions ("caption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "caption_language" TEXT /* Preferred caption language */,
  "font_size" INTEGER /* Preferred font size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "key" TEXT /* Configuration key */,
  "value" TEXT /* Configuration value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)
